title: Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Notification 2026 has been released on 8 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 35 years who have a Bachelor of Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry Degree are eligible to apply for this Veterinary Assistant Surgeon vacancy. The online application process for Mizoram PSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 has started on 8 May 2026 and will remain open until 19 June 2026. C

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates. Age Limit as on 01-01-2026.

qualification.details: Bachelor of Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry Degree from a recognised University. Valid Registration under the Veterinary Council of India OR Mizoram State Veterinary Council. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
